author: Daniel Addis
name: MetaStack v3 Near-SOTA H100
blurb: Near-SOTA non-record run: 10-layer GPT with BigramHash, SmearGate, orthogonal init, SWA, Muon WD=0.04, mixed int5/int6 quantization, 2% magnitude pruning, and sliding-window int6 eval. Best confirmed seed reached 1.1762 BPB under the 16MB cap, but the timed run stopped 73ms over the strict 10-minute limit, so this is submitted to the non-record track.
